recalls.Description: Homewerks Worldwide has issued a recall for Allen + Roth lighted dimmable LED wall mirrors, manufactured between December 2022 and August 2023. These frameless bathroom mirrors feature a touch sensor for dimmable LED lighting and were sold in three sizes. The models include the 75-102 (24" x 30"), 75-103 (30" x 36"), and 75-104 (36" x 42"). Model numbers and manufacturing dates are labeled on the back, while Lowe's item numbers can be found in the instruction manual and on purchase receipts.
recalls.Title: Homewerks Worldwide Recalls Allen + Roth Lighted Bathroom Mirrors Due to Injury Risks; Available Exclusively at Lowe's
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Homewerks Worldwide at 866-582-2069 from 7:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email MirrorRecall@Homewerks.com, or visit www.Homewerks.com/MirrorRecall for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Allen + Roth frameless dimmable LED wall mirror, model 75-102
Recalled Allen + Roth frameless dimmable LED wall mirror, model 75-103
Recalled Allen + Roth frameless dimmable LED wall mirror, model 75-104
Date code on back of mirror

Injuries.Name: Lowe's has received 44 reports of the mirror's glass detaching from the wall attachment base. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Lowe's stores nationwide and online at Lowes.com from February 2023 through July 2024, priced between $250 and $610.

Importers.Name: Homewerks Worldwide LLC, of Lake Bluff, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Risk of glass detaching from the wall mount, leading to potential injuries and lacerations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the affected mirrors, turn off the power, and contact Homewerks Worldwide for guidance on safe removal and disposal to receive a full refund or a replacement mirror, including shipping. Homewerks and Lowe's will directly notify all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Homewerks recalls Allen + Roth lighted bathroom mirrors due to injury risks. Contact for refunds or replacements.

recalls.Description: The recall affects Origin 21 oval and rectangle wall mirrors featuring black metal frames. The rectangle model measures 22 inches wide by 31 inches long (model number L1-MH-1647), while the oval model is 24 inches wide by 36 inches long (model number L1-MH-1693). Both model numbers can be found on a label on the back of the mirrors. There is a risk of these mirrors detaching from their hanging plates, leading to potential falls and injury.
recalls.Title: Recall of Origin 21 Wall Mirrors Due to Laceration and Impact Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Huahong Art Home Shares at 888-803-0488 from 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email wallmirrors@realtimeresults.net, or visit https://www.recallrtr.com/wallmirrors.

Images.Caption: Recalled Origin 21 Oval Black Framed Wall Mirror (front and back)
Recalled Origin 21 Rectangle Black Framed Wall Mirror (front and back)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 15 reports of the mirrors separating from the metal hanger and falling. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Huahong Art Home Shares Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available at Lowe's Stores across the country and online at Lowes.com from October 2023 through April 2024, priced between $60 and $80.

Importers.Name: Lowe's Companies Inc., of Mooresville, North Carolina

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration and impact from falling mirrors

Remedies.Name: Stop using the mirrors and contact Huahong Art Home Shares for a full refund. Consumers will need to provide photos of the mirror or arrange for a pre-paid shipping box. The company is reaching out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Origin 21 wall mirrors due to safety hazards. Contact Huahong Art Home Shares for refunds and instructions.
